name: MOONG DAL KHILMA
intro: This recipe holds a special place in my heart. It reminds me of my school tiffins which came brimming with this sabji. The crunchy sev softens with time as it sits pretty in a well-spiced tomato gravy.
method: In a pan, heat the oil and add the cumin seeds. When they begin to crackle, add the ginger paste and sauté for 30 seconds.
Add the asafoetida, turmeric powder and red chilli powder and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the boiled gram with ¼ cup of water and stir well.
Finish with the garam masala and lemon juice and adjust the seasoning.
Cook the khilma for 4-5 minutes on medium heat and garnish with coriander leaves. Serve hot.
